items.title: [负面] 更新增负，长草期长，活动乏味，硬堆数值，键帽策划，手机上玩着卡，steam也卡，优点是剧情和美术，但...
items.summary: 更新增负，长草期长，活动乏味，硬堆数值，键帽策划，手机上玩着卡，steam也卡，优点是剧情和美术，但是美术跑路了，一年只有八次活动的产能。最近更新的深潜跳关扣分是真给我整绷不住了，你不想减负可以删掉这个功能的，就惦记你这点在线吧，人跑完了就对了。建议去玩杀戮尖塔。

items.title: [正面] 画风好看，极力推荐
[正面] 好玩，我玩过的卡牌游戏里最好玩的一个
items.summary: 好玩，我玩过的卡牌游戏里最好玩的一个

items.title: [正面] Hollee Chit...  This game goes hard and doesn't st...
items.summary: Hollee Chit...  This game goes hard and doesn't stop.  The StS battles are good and require thought, no autoplay, disturbing art, great characters and seems generous on the gatcha.  The atmosphere is what really makes it however, Morimens' Cthulhu pantheon bona fides are very much for real.  As for the writing, anyone who thinks this looks interesting has dealt with dodgy translations of unreleased games already, as usual anything worth playing is worth a few rough edges.
